title: Blobs, Bento, Gravity, Magnetic & Palette
description: CSS blob morphing, glassmorphic bento grid, cursor-gravity typography, magnetic spring buttons, and a ⌘K command palette.

drops.title: Organic Blob Chorus
drops.description: 9 CSS blobs morphing through organic shapes using multi-value border-radius animation with staggered timing.
drops.concept: CSS border-radius accepts up to 8 values (4 horizontal + 4 vertical radii) enabling fully organic blob shapes. Animating these values with staggered delays and varying durations creates a mesmerizing living-sculpture grid. Trending in 2026 as an alternative to SVG path animation — pure CSS, zero JS for the morphing.
drops.source: CSS organic blob shape animation — freefrontend.com CSS Blob Effects

interaction.mouse: Hover any blob to energise (brightness + scale)

drops.title: Glassmorphic Bento Grid
drops.description: Asymmetric CSS Grid with frosted-glass tiles, gradient border hover, and mouse-tracked 3D tilt.
drops.concept: Bento grids are the dominant layout pattern of 2025-2026, seen on every major tech landing page. This demo pairs the asymmetric multi-span grid layout with glassmorphism (backdrop-filter + translucent panels) and a gradient border effect triggered via ::after pseudo-element on hover. Mouse-tracking rotateX/rotateY adds tactile depth.
drops.source: Bento Grid CSS: Complete Tutorial + Free Examples 2026 — dev.to

interaction.mouse: Move cursor over tiles for 3D tilt + gradient border reveal
interaction.touch: Tiles still show hover states on tap

drops.title: Cursor Gravity Typography
drops.description: Each letter of a display heading attracts toward cursor with spring physics, in three switchable modes.
drops.concept: Kinetic typography is the top type trend of 2026. This demo physically simulates attraction between cursor and individual letter spans using Verlet spring integration — the same physics used in game engines. Three modes: attract (letters pull toward cursor), repel (letters flee), and wave (letters undulate in a sine pattern). No variable fonts needed.
drops.source: Kinetic typography is the web design trend you can't ignore in 2026 — itamde.com

interaction.mouse: Move cursor near letters to attract/repel/wave them
interaction.touch: Touch and drag to move letters

drops.title: Magnetic Spring Buttons
drops.description: 9 pill buttons that elastically pull toward cursor with Verlet spring physics; blob cursor and click sparks.
drops.concept: Magnetic button effects are the go-to micro-interaction for premium landing pages in 2026. This demo implements proper spring physics: each button computes the cursor distance within its magnetic radius and applies a proportional pull force, then integrates velocity with damping each frame. The blob cursor grows and colorizes near buttons. Clicking emits spark particles.
drops.source: Magnetic Hover Effect: Creating Cursor-Attracted Buttons with Vanilla JavaScript — inithtml.com

interaction.mouse: Move cursor near buttons to attract them
interaction.click: Emit spark particles; adjust magnetic radius with slider

drops.title: Command Palette ⌘K
drops.description: Fuzzy-search command palette with spring-scale entry, keyboard navigation, grouped results, and match highlighting.
drops.concept: The ⌘K command palette has become a universal UI pattern in 2025-2026, adopted by AI tools, dev environments, and SaaS dashboards. This demo implements the full interaction: spring scale-in animation on open, real-time fuzzy search with character highlighting, arrow-key navigation, grouped result sections, and keyboard shortcut hints. No external library — 80 lines of vanilla JS.
drops.source: 21st.dev UI component library — command palette pattern

interaction.mouse: Click trigger buttons or hover result rows
interaction.click: Select a command to dismiss with flash
interaction.touch: Tap triggers; touch to scroll results; keyboard: ↑↓ navigate, Enter select, Esc close
